implemented: Removed voice mapping from options and UI.
Removed extra voice/watermark block under POS filter.
POS filter closes options, refreshes deck, and autoplays first filtered card.
Unit replaced with Einheit in UI contexts.
Visible version set to v1.0.0 and APP_VERSION variable added.
Best-effort PWA background audio support via Service Worker, AudioContext, and MediaSession.
limitations: Mobile web/PWA background TTS cannot be guaranteed on all iOS/Android browsers after screen lock or app switch; the code now uses best-effort AudioContext + MediaSession, but native background audio needs a native wrapper/foreground service.
Exact 99% synonym verification still requires a semantic API.
